aiAutoVerify.title: Background AI analysis
aiAutoVerify.description: When enabled, pending listings are analysed by AI in the background and the result is stored — so the review dialog shows it instantly on open, with no waiting. It never approves or rejects; admins still decide. When disabled, the review dialog won't show AI results.
aiAutoVerify.enabledToast: Background AI analysis enabled. Results will be ready when the review dialog opens.
aiAutoVerify.disabledToast: Background AI analysis disabled. The review dialog will no longer show AI results.
aiAutoVerify.toggleError: Failed to update the setting. Please try again.

aiAnalysis.title: AI Analysis
aiAnalysis.disclaimer: AI-assisted moderation. The AI does not make the final decision.
aiAnalysis.noResult: No AI analysis yet for this listing. Turn on "Background AI analysis" so the system runs it automatically and shows the result here.
aiAnalysis.advisoryNote: This AI assessment is advisory only — the moderation decision remains with you.
